description:
'''Jerk''' is a [[music genre|music subgenre]] blending [[hip-hop]] and [[internet rap]] that emerged in New York City during the early 2020s. It draws inspiration from the original 2000s wave of [[Jerkin'|jerk rap and street dance culture]].

Notable artists associated with the scene include [[Xaviersobased]], [[Phreshboyswag]], [[Nettspend]], [[Fakemink]], [[Islurwhenitalk]], [[Maxon Margiela]], [[YT (rapper)|YT]], [[EsDeeKid]], [[Yhapojj]], [[Jim Legxacy]] and [[Yuke (rapper)|Yuke]]. The genre achieved particularly significant success in the United Kingdom, where it helped give rise to the [[UK underground rap|UK Underground scene]].
